---
title: "LRP80: Does word reading route through taught-receptive vocabulary? (mediation; TE companion)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

The receptive companion to [LRP68](../lrp-rli-med-068) (taught *expressive* vocabulary $TE$).
The DAG gives both taught nodes a direct edge to word reading ($TR \to WR$ predates decision 5;
$TE \to WR$ was added with it), so a $TR \to WR$ mediation is graph-warranted. Running $TE$ and
$TR$ through the identical machinery asks whether the intervention's word-reading ($W$) gain
routes through taught *comprehension* as well as through taught *production* — a symmetric check
on the lexical route.

## Design

Mirrors LRP68, swapping the mediator $TE \to TR$: phase 0 only, $n \approx 53$. Mediator
$TR_{t2}$ (Beta-Binomial on $TR_{t1}$); outcome $W_{t2}$ with a $G \times TR$ interaction.
Adjustment $\{G, A, L, E, W_\text{pre}, TR_{t1}\}$ — letter sounds $L$ (the competing code route)
and standardised *expressive* vocab $E$ are the measured mediator–outcome confounders.
Standardised *receptive* vocab $R$ is a **descendant** of $TR$ (transfer edge $TR \to RV$), so it
is deliberately **not** adjusted — mirroring LRP68's exclusion of $E$ for the expressive
mediator, so each taught-vocab mediation drops its own same-modality standardised measure and
keeps the cross-modality one plus $L$.

## Assumptions

ID-2: the $TR \to WR$ leg is $GA$-confounded and dose is a treatment-induced mediator–outcome
confounder, so the NDE/NIE are **adjusted associations, not point-identified**. Contemporaneous
measurement; $n \approx 53 \Rightarrow$ wide intervals.

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_results_mediation.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
